summary: Tested banner integration on homepage and listing detail page. Header banner working on homepage. All 3 banner placements (detail_below_gallery, detail_below_info, detail_before_similar) working correctly on listing detail page for both mobile and desktop. Native ad feed banners NOT appearing on homepage due to backend configuration issue.

minor.issue: Returns null - no banner configured for feed_after_10 placement. This causes FeedBanner to not render on homepage.
Returns null - no banner configured for feed_after_15 placement.

integration_issues.issue: FeedBanner components not rendering because backend returns null for feed_after_10 placement. The position calculation (position >= 10 uses feed_after_10) means feed_after_5 banner is never used.

action_items: Configure banners for feed_after_10 and feed_after_15 placements in backend to enable native ad feed banners on homepage
Alternative: Adjust FeedBanner position thresholds to use feed_after_5 for positions up to 15 (change condition from position >= 10 to position >= 15)
critical_code_review_comments: BannerSlot component correctly implemented with Sponsored labels and click tracking
FeedBanner native ad component has proper styling (Ad badge, Promoted label, Learn More CTA) but returns null when API has no banner
Listing detail page correctly has all 3 banner placements for both mobile and desktop views
Position calculation in FeedBanner may need adjustment - position 12 uses feed_after_10 instead of feed_after_5

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Header banner and detail page banners working, feed banners not appearing due to backend config

context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner integration mostly working. Issue: Native ad feed banners on homepage not appearing because feed_after_10 and feed_after_15 placements have no banners configured in backend. The feed_after_5 has a banner but position calculation means it's never used. Test listing ID: fb3227c3-63b9-4005-875c-d1efa6675170

test_verification_results.homepage_feed_banners: FAIL - Not rendering because backend returns null for feed_after_10
test_verification_results.listing_detail_desktop_below_gallery: PASS - Banner visible with Sponsored label
test_verification_results.listing_detail_desktop_below_info: PASS - Banner visible with Sponsored label
test_verification_results.listing_detail_desktop_before_similar: PASS - Banner visible with Sponsored label
test_verification_results.listing_detail_mobile_all_placements: PASS - All 3 banners visible on mobile
test_verification_results.sponsored_labels: PASS - All banners have Sponsored labels

rca_of_issue: The native ad feed banners are not appearing on the homepage because: 1) FeedBanner component calculates placement based on position (position >= 10 uses feed_after_10, position >= 15 uses feed_after_15), 2) With 4 columns and banner after 3 rows, position is 12, triggering feed_after_10, 3) Backend has no banner configured for feed_after_10 placement, returning null, 4) FeedBanner returns null when no banner data available. Solution: Either configure banners for feed_after_10/15 in backend, or adjust the FeedBanner position thresholds.
